hero.subtitle: Bespoke suits, shirts and classic wardrobe — crafted with tradition and passion.

masshemd.title: BESPOKE SHIRT
masshemd.desc: Collar, cuff and fit made to measure.

about.title: Bespoke clothing with tradition and passion
about.values_tradition_body: A centuries-old craft, cultivated since 1999 — tailoring in the classic manner.
about.values_quality_body: Fine fabrics from European mills, carefully made — 100% Made in the EU.
about.values_individuality_body: Every piece is made to your measurements and wishes — individual, valuable, timeless.
about.fallback_body: Since 1999, our maxim has been individual, valuable and timeless with a contemporary spirit. We care for bespoke wardrobes in the traditional manner.

appointment.title: Your Personal Appointment
appointment.subtitle: Visit us at one of our 19 ateliers across Germany.

items.text: Excellent advice and first-class workmanship. My bespoke suit fits perfectly — highly recommended.
From the first appointment to the fitting, the whole process was professional and pleasant. The quality is exceptional.
Knowledgeable team, refined fabrics and a perfect fit. Tailoring is still lived as a craft here.
I had my wedding suit made here. The result exceeded every expectation.
Individual advice at the highest level. You feel well looked after from the first minute.
Tradition meets modernity. The bespoke suit is a masterpiece and the service was outstanding.

locations.title: 19 Locations Across Germany
locations.subtitle: Find the cove atelier nearest to you.

wiki.title: The Gentleman's Lexicon
wiki.body: From Bespoke to Harris Tweed — our wiki explains the world of bespoke tailoring.
wiki.index_subtitle: The lexicon of bespoke tailoring — from A to Z.

bespoke.title: Bespoke
bespoke.meta: Bespoke is the highest level of custom tailoring.
bespoke.body: Bespoke is the highest class of tailoring: a garment designed and made from the ground up to the client’s individual measurements and wishes.

full-canvas.title: Full Canvas
full-canvas.meta: Full canvas is the highest-quality jacket construction.
full-canvas.body: In full-canvas construction, a continuous horsehair canvas is worked between the outer cloth and lining, giving the jacket shape, movement and longevity.

hochzeitsanzug.title: Wedding Suit
hochzeitsanzug.body: A made-to-measure wedding suit is tailored to the groom and the occasion, from cloth and cut to the personal details.

kaschmir-cashmere.title: Cashmere
kaschmir-cashmere.meta: Cashmere is one of the finest natural fibres.
kaschmir-cashmere.body: Cashmere is among the finest natural fibres. The soft wool of the cashmere goat is especially light, warm and smooth to the touch.

harris-tweed.title: Harris Tweed
harris-tweed.meta: Harris Tweed is handwoven in the Outer Hebrides.
harris-tweed.body: Harris Tweed is a handwoven wool cloth from Scotland’s Outer Hebrides and is protected by its own act of parliament. It stands for durability and timeless style.

flanell.title: Flannel
flanell.meta: Flannel is a soft, brushed wool cloth.
flanell.body: Flannel is a soft, lightly brushed wool cloth with a warm hand, a classic choice for autumn and winter wardrobes.

footer.tagline: Bespoke clothing by master tailors — since 1999.

booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.subtitle: Just a few steps to your personal consultation.
booking.privacy: I agree to the privacy policy.
booking.success: Thank you! Your appointment request has been received.
booking.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers about bespoke clothing and your appointment at cove.

items.q: What happens during a cove fitting appointment?
items.a: In a personal consultation we take measurements, discuss fabrics, cut and details, and advise you on your individual wardrobe.

items.q: How long does it take to make a bespoke suit?
items.a: A bespoke suit usually takes several weeks, depending on model, fabric and atelier capacity. We will give you a clear timeframe during your appointment.
We work with leading European mills and offer a wide selection of wool, cashmere, tweed, flannel and other fine materials.
cove is represented at 19 locations across Germany, including Berlin, Hamburg, Munich, Düsseldorf, Cologne and Frankfurt.

items.q: Can I book an appointment online?
items.a: Yes, you can conveniently book a consultation at your preferred atelier online.

shop.title: Shop
shop.subtitle: Ready To Wear, shoes, accessories and more.

common.not_found_body: You may find what you are looking for on our homepage.

stories.title: Insights With Purpose.
stories.bespoke_body: Measurements, posture, occasion and personal style define the line — not a fixed template.
stories.cloth_body: From poplin to flannel, cloth determines drape, hand and everyday suitability.
stories.fitting_body: Wedding tailoring should be present without overpowering the wearer.
